title: Fragile Pots
description: Decorated pots only drop themselves when using silk touch! Useful when raiding Trial Chambers or other dungeons that utilize pots as loot.
body:
An extremely simple datapack that makes decorated pots only drop when broken with silk touch. Many times I've gone into a Trial Chamber and broken every pot I see, only to be met with a million different bricks and pots that only serve to clog up my inventory. Thus, I created this pack.

All items inside the pots are preserved, so don't worry about missing your sweet, sweet loot.
